boundary_binding.action_boundary: May procurement issue the purchase order for a controlled solvent?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: EHS release exactly matches chemical, band, facility, PO before issuance
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: No open defect in source boundary

critical_features_preserved: exact match on quantity band and PO
final_answer: Source records close the boundary. EHS-NOV-042 matches NS-55 solvent, 0-25L band, Facility R2, and PO-NOV-042 before issuance per STD-NOV-042-P. Procurement may issue PO-NOV-042. SRC-NOV-042 limits only quotes, not execution. No unresolved defects remain.
